TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Ibrahim_Boubacar_Keïta, title = Ibrahim_Boubacar_Keïta, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ibrahim_Boubacar_Keïta} }

S.FORM: == Ibrahim Boubacar Keïta (1945-2022) == ryax sa tay 29 nqu tay 1, Ibrahim Boubacar Keïta, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1945) mrhuw Mali ta' misuw hya' ga Ibrahim Boubacar Keïta, aring ryax tay 4 squ byacing tay 9 sa kawas 2013 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'

== Ibrahim Boubacar Keïta (1945-2022) == ryax sa tay 29 nqu tay 1, Ibrahim Boubacar Keïta, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1945) mrhuw Mali ta' misuw hya' ga Ibrahim Boubacar Keïta, aring ryax tay 4 squ byacing tay 9 sa kawas 2013 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: == iβraħim βouβaʦ~ʨar ke*ta (****-****) == rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, iβraħim βouβaʦ~ʨar ke*ta, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw mali taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa iβraħim βouβaʦ~ʨar ke*ta, ariŋ rjax taj * s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ
